content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — PaywallView.swift:9 offers "1 week of Premium free" explicitly conditioned on leaving a 5-star review, directly matching the "review for reward" pattern.
Pierre: Apple explicitly bans forcing or incentivizing star ratings/reviews (3.2.2(x), 2.3.9) because it manipulates App Store trust signals — this quid-pro-quo copy is a textbook violation, not a gray area. Remove the review-for-reward line entirely and instead use SKStoreReviewController's native prompt (unconditional, no reward tied to it) if you want to encourage reviews.
